common.footerHelp: Need help with an order? Reply to any of our emails or use the contact form on wordsthatsells.website

login.title: Sign in - Words That Sells
login.checkEmailBody: If {email} is a valid address, a sign-in link is on its way. It works once and expires in 15 minutes.
login.spamNotice: Nothing arriving? Check your spam folder, or go back and try again.
login.welcomeSub: Enter your email — and your password if you've set one in your profile.
login.passwordPlaceholder: Leave empty for an email link
login.forgotHint: Forgot your password? Leave the password empty and we'll email you a secure sign-in link — you can set a new password from your profile.
login.autoAccountHint: No account yet? Just enter your email — your account is created automatically. You stay signed in on this device for 30 days.
login.rateLimited: Too many sign-in attempts, please try again later.
login.errorInvalidCreds: Email or password incorrect — or this account has no password yet. Leave the password empty and we’ll email you a sign-in link instead.
login.errorLinkInvalid: That sign-in link is not valid. Request a new one below.
login.errorLinkExpired: That sign-in link has expired or was already used. Request a new one below.
login.errorInactive: This account is not active. Contact us if you think this is a mistake.
login.errorGeneric: Something went wrong signing you in. Please request a new link.

errors.pageNotFound: The page you are looking for does not exist.
errors.serverError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

dashboard.sentNote: Thanks — your request is in. We'll get back to you by email, usually within one business day.
dashboard.hintContent: Tell us what you need — topic, audience, where it will be used, and any deadline.
dashboard.hintQuestion: Ask us anything about your services, orders, or marketing — we read every message.
dashboard.noFilesYet: No files yet — your deliverables will appear here.
dashboard.pwTip: Tip: Set a password for instant access next time — no email checking required.
dashboard.noOrders: No orders on this account yet.
dashboard.noOrdersBody: Orders placed with {email} appear here automatically — or {browseLink} to get started.
dashboard.bcelReference: Waiting for your BCEL One transfer. Include reference {reference} in the payment note — we confirm within one business day of receiving it.
dashboard.title: My Account - Words That Sells
dashboard.loadError: Failed to load your orders. Please try again.

billing.heading: Billing
billing.subtitle: Your payments, pending transfers and subscriptions — all in one place.
billing.cancelNote: To change or cancel a subscription, {link} from your dashboard — we handle it the same business day.
billing.historyEmpty: Nothing here yet. Orders placed with your email appear automatically.
billing.invoiceNote: Need an invoice or receipt for any payment? {link} and we'll email it over.
billing.title: Billing - Words That Sells
billing.loadError: Failed to load your billing history. Please try again.

files.heading: My Files
files.subtitle: Reports, designs and deliverables we've shared with you.
files.emptyBody: Deliverables we share with you will appear here.
files.title: My Files - Words That Sells
files.loadError: Failed to load your files. Please try again.
files.linkInvalid: This file link is not valid.

chat.heading: AI Marketing Strategist
chat.subtitle: Ask about your services, orders, or anything marketing — SEO, content, social, web.
chat.offlineNotice: The AI Strategist isn't switched on yet — it's coming soon. In the meantime, use {link} and our team will get back to you by email within one business day.
chat.offlineNoticeLink: the quick actions on your dashboard
chat.greeting: Hi! I'm your marketing strategist. I can see your services, orders and files, and I know the Lao and Southeast Asian market.
chat.greetingTry: Try: “What should my next marketing step be?” or “Explain my last order.”
chat.errorGeneric: Something went wrong — please try again.
chat.footerNote: The strategist can see only your own account. For changes to orders or services, use your dashboard's quick actions.
chat.title: AI Strategist - Words That Sells
chat.rateLimited: You are sending messages a little fast — give it a few minutes and try again.
chat.unavailable: The AI Strategist is not available yet. Please use the quick actions on your dashboard instead.
chat.upstreamError: The strategist is having a moment — please try again shortly, or send us a quick request from your dashboard.

profile.heading: My Profile
profile.savedPasswordSet: Profile saved — your password is set. You can now sign in with it on any device.
profile.emailNote: Your email is your account — contact us if you need to change it.
profile.passwordNote: With a password you can sign in instantly on any device. Email sign-in links keep working either way — leave both fields empty to keep things as they are.
profile.languageNote: Applies to your portal pages and the emails we send you.
profile.title: My Profile - Words That Sells
profile.passwordTooShort: The password must be at least 8 characters.

boards.title: My Boards - Words That Sells
boards.heading: Boards
boards.subtitle: Live whiteboards shared with you for working sessions with your strategist.
boards.empty: No shared boards yet — your strategist will invite you when a working session starts.

errors.roleNoCommenting: Your role on this board does not allow commenting
errors.parentNotFound: Parent comment not found on this board
errors.roleNoResolving: Your role on this board does not allow resolving comments
errors.loadApprovalStatus: Failed to load the approval status
errors.roleNoReviewing: Your role on this board does not allow reviewing
errors.noOpenApproval: No open approval request to decide
errors.imageTooLarge: That image is over the 8 MB limit.
errors.roleNoUpload: You can comment on this board, but not add images.
errors.badImageType: Only PNG, JPEG, GIF and WebP images can be placed on a board.
errors.adminOnlyFinal: Only the WTS team can designate final deliverables.
errors.invalidPrice: Enter a price of 0 or more (0 releases the file for free).
errors.adminOnlyUnlock: Only the WTS team can unlock deliverables.
errors.noFinalDeliverable: No final deliverable found for that image.
errors.roleNoArranging: Your role on this board does not allow arranging images.
errors.stackingOutOfRange: Stacking order is out of range.
errors.placementNothingToUpdate: A placement has nothing to update.
errors.imagesNotOnBoard: One or more images do not belong to this board.
errors.roleNoRemoving: Your role on this board does not allow removing images.
errors.adminOnlyRemoveFinal: Only the WTS team can remove a final deliverable.
errors.alreadyUnlocked: This deliverable is already unlocked — use Download final.
errors.noPriceSet: This deliverable has no price set. Please contact us.
errors.paymentUnavailable: Online payment is not available right now. Please contact us to pay by bank transfer — we will unlock your download as soon as the payment is confirmed.
errors.checkoutFailed: Could not start the payment. Please try again or contact us.
errors.bcelFailed: Could not prepare the bank transfer. Please contact us.
errors.paymentRequired: This deliverable is released after payment.

reviewRequested.subject: Your review is requested — {title}
reviewRequested.body: Your strategist has asked you to review the whiteboard {title}.
reviewRequested.action: {link} to approve it or request changes.
reviewRequested.textBody: Your review is requested on "{title}". Open {link} to approve it or request changes.

magicLink.subject: Your sign-in link — {brand}
magicLink.title: Sign in to your account
magicLink.intro: Click the button below to sign in. The link works once and expires in 15 minutes.
magicLink.linkFallback: If the button doesn't work, copy this address into your browser:
magicLink.ignore: Didn't request this? You can safely ignore this email.
magicLink.text:
Sign in to {brand}: {link}
The link works once and expires in 15 minutes.

orderReceived.subject: Order received — {brand}
orderReceived.thanksProduct: Thanks — we've recorded your order for {product}.
orderReceived.referenceNote: When you make your BCEL One transfer, include this reference in the payment note:
orderReceived.track: We confirm every payment within one business day. Track your order any time at {portalLink} — sign in with this email address, no password needed.
orderReceived.textReference: Include reference {reference} in your BCEL One transfer note.

fileReady.subject: A new file is ready for you — {title}
fileReady.title: A new file is ready for you
fileReady.text: A new file is ready for you: {title}. Open your portal: {portalUrl}

portalApi.signupRateLimited: Too many sign-up attempts, please try again later.
portalApi.loginRateLimited: Too many sign-in attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
portalApi.loginFailed: The email or password doesn't match our records. Please try again, or use an email sign-in link instead.
